MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-23-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

1 - The motion of Defendant 170 OFF THIRD Owners' Association to strike 7 of Plaintiff's Prayer For Relief is GRANTED. In all other respects, the motion is DENIED.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: John M. True, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMT)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-23-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

2- Defendant's Demurrer is OVERRULED. Plaintiff's counsel to submit a proposed order to this effect to the Court for its approval.

Judge: John M. True, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMT)
